description: Create a content slide titled Americas showing a three-column list layout of tax alerts by country with bullet points and dates, plus top navigation tabs for regions.

items.text: Argentina enacts amendments under Labor Modernization Law affecting income tax, VAT and excise taxes
Argentina allows exporters to convert and display tax credit balances and export refunds in US dollars
Canada Border Services Agency adjusts certain fees for inflation and GST/HST
Ways and Means Subpanel holds digital trade hearing
Canada Border Services Agency issues 2026 trade compliance verification list
Canada provides guidance for steel derivative goods surtax and relief for certain steel goods
Canada Border Security Agency invites feedback on 2023 revisions to Valuation for Duty Regulations
Canada announces new trade measures for steel imports
Chile issues new ruling confirming no withholding tax on software distribution under Chile-US tax treaty, highlighting applicability for regional hubs
Colombian Government establishes temporary taxes amid State of Economic Emergency
Mexico Confirms New Import Tariffs Effective January 1, 2026
Amendments to the Customs Law for 2026
US Customs and Border Protection announces 20 April 2026 rollout of CACE process for Phase 1 entries to administer IEEPA duty refunds in ACE
US presidential proclamation modifies Section 232 tariffs on steel, aluminum, copper and their derivative products

right.title: Regional navigation
right.body: Tabs: Americas; Asia-Pacific; Europe, Middle East, India and Africa.
